title: manulea decipiens
intro: Manulea decipiens, also known as the Cape manulea, is a plant species found in South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Manulea decipiens include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Manulea decipiens can be prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
